programme.title: Locked On HBCU
programme.desc:
Locked On HBCU host Darrion "Mouth of the South" Gray breaks down all of the sports news around the HBCU landscape. Darrion, a Texas Southern alum and former TSU Herald sports editor, is dedicated to giving a fair and in-depth look at all the talent across HBCU sports—not just the big schools like Southern University, Grambling University, and Alabama A&M. It's easy to get updates on Deion Sanders and Jackson State, but this is the only daily podcast breaking it all down across the entirety of HBCUs, from SWAC to MEAC to SIAC, CIAA, GCAC, and those outside of the traditional HBCU conferences like Tennessee State, Hampton, and North Carolina A&T. From the Bayou Classic to the Tuskegee Morehouse Classic and from 0 to the 5th, Locked On HBCU has you covered.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: S1E1 Tour
programme.desc: Pursuing the Tour de France, one of the most physically demanding sporting events in the world, covers over 3,535 kilometers in just three weeks. Every young cyclist dreams of competing in this prestigious race, but only nine riders from each team make the cut. Young cyclist Adam Yates is giving everything he has to prove he belongs on cycling’s biggest stage. 2016 Tour de France winner Chris Froome reflects on the long and grueling journey to victory, while former professional cyclists and Tour de France veterans Jens Voigt, Christian Vande Velde, and Haimar Zubeldia reveal what it truly takes to compete at the highest level.

programme.title: Road Trip Masters

programme.title: Road Trip Masters

programme.title: Road Trip Masters

programme.title: Eat Play Stay: Alien Surprises in Roswell, NM
programme.desc: Embark on an out-of-this-world journey to Roswell, New Mexico! Unveil intriguing alien mysteries, order from a McDonald's with a secret menu and stay the night in a Cold War missile bunker. Don't miss this extraordinary adventure!

programme.title: America's Most Delish Midwest: 10 Unexpected Eats with Midwest Flair
programme.desc: Uncover the Midwest's unexpected. From quirky to inventive flavor mash-ups like the bulgogi burger to the questionable sour cream & raisin pie, see how the area crafts some interesting but delightful culinary concoctions.

programme.title: My Perfect Day with Woman's Day: Grandmothers Pinky-Promise to Self Care
programme.desc: Karla, a devoted mother and doting grandmother has had her fair share of obstacles from two bouts of cancer to caring for her husband and daughter. Karla embarks on a much needed day of pampering, seeking solace and self-care.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen: Creole Cook-Off
programme.desc: Meet a pair of dueling Creole dishes when Chef Eric Cook of Gris Gris battles it out against Chef Ericka Michelle Lassair of Diva Dawg. Will “Chef Diva’s” signature sauce stump her worthy opponent, or will “Cookie” manage to pull a rabbit out of a chef’s hat?

programme.title: Absolutely Albuquerque : From Skateboarding to RC Racing with a Soccer Pro
programme.desc: On two feet or four wheels, Amanda is on the move with soccer superstar Devon Sandoval. Together they compete head-to-head with high powered RC cars, build a board with an expert skater, and join in the wild fandom of New Mexico’s beloved team.
